title: PepeLand Resourcepack
body:
![PPL Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84ea4bad1900630275bd6566c2b435d6df0107a8.jpeg)
> # Description [EN]:
> A special resource pack for the PepeLand community, containing:
> <details>
> <summary>Custom textures armor (Work in pack versions 1.12.2 and below)</summary>
>   
> ![Costumes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/841e5b6f780451868985ef8a7396d741da67b302.png)
> 
> </details>
> 
> <details>
> <summary>Custom items</summary>
>   
> ![Custom items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6e5f3cbfac3f36bc7d2006ee7fae39244d7c1da.png)
> 
> </details>
> 
> <details>
> <summary>Emotes in chat</summary>
>   
> ![Emotes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80ee8cb6f0dddd5b3fbee4effafbcd631ff50047.png)
> 
> </details>
> 
> <details>
> <summary>Custom item paintings textures</summary>
>   
> ![Paintings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0d4175367f009129305526675a8094214aa7357.png)
> 
> </details>
> 
> ### **[RP Wiki](https://pplpack.wiki/)**
> 
> ## **Requires:**
> [Symbol chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/symbol-chat)
> 
> ### **In pack versions 1.12.2 and below:**
> [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) 
> 
> OR
> 
> [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)
> 
> [RP Renames](https://modrinth.com/mod/rp-renames) advisable to install


> # Описание [RU]:
> Специальный ресурспак для PepeLand Сообщеста, содержащий:
> <details>
> <summary>Кастомная текстура брони (Работает на версиях 1.12.2 и ниже)</summary>
>   
> ![Costumes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/841e5b6f780451868985ef8a7396d741da67b302.png)
> 
> </details>
> 
> <details>
> <summary>Кастомные предметы</summary>
>   
> ![Custom items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6e5f3cbfac3f36bc7d2006ee7fae39244d7c1da.png)
> 
> </details>
> 
> <details>
> <summary>Эмоуты в чате</summary>
>   
> ![Emotes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80ee8cb6f0dddd5b3fbee4effafbcd631ff50047.png)
> 
> </details>
> 
> <details>
> <summary>Кастомные текстуры предметов картин</summary>
>   
> ![Paintings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0d4175367f009129305526675a8094214aa7357.png)
> 
> </details>
> 
> ### **[Вики ресурспака](https://pplpack.wiki/)**
> 
> ## **Необходимы:**
> [Symbol chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/symbol-chat)
> 
> ### **На версиях пака 1.12.2 и ниже:**
> [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads)
> 
> Или
> 
> [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)
> 
> [RP Renames](https://modrinth.com/mod/rp-renames) желателен к установке

[![https://pepeland.net/](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff9ab8417768f4d3ab559eb0029148b24c8d115b.png)](https://pepeland.net) 

### Поддержка:
[![https://boosty.to/pepelandresourcepack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e84e596d368c656f6546ce27b1b79f3e4e75c5da.png)](https://boosty.to/pepelandresourcepack)

## **Авторы/Authors:**
Shvedoff - 3D Models, RP architecture/3D модели, Архитектура пака.

Gamdav - Main RP artist/Основной художник пака.

cloudy31_ - RP artist/Художник пака.

ItsFinneR - RP artist/Художник пака.

MabrNon - RP artist/Художник пака.

Jehervs - RP icon artist/Художник иконок пака.

drt_s_s - Emotes in chat/Эмодзи в чате.

Okakuh - Programmer/Программист(автоматизация процессов)

Manukq - Wiki Developer/Разработчик сайта документации

AndcoolSystems - Wiki Developer/Разработчик сайта документации

DuckDomestos - Creator of pack/Создатель пака.
